title: This Open Source Repo Solves Claude Code's Biggest Problem
summary: Ponytail is an open source repository that solves Claude Code's biggest problem by providing architecture, memory, and observability infrastructure. It enables developers to set up an agentic OS on top of Claude Code for improved efficiency and performance.
